items.title: Trump's Economic Plan 'Too Quick' And 'Too Painful:' Economist Warns Stocks Could Drop 30-50% After Monday's Mayhem
items.author: Rishabh Mishra
items.description: Economist Craig Shapiro warns that President Trump's economic transition plan, which aims to reduce government spending and boost private sector growth, could trigger a 30-50% collapse in stocks and home prices, leading to severe economic turmoil in the short term.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article suggests that the Nasdaq 100 index, which the QQQ ETF tracks, could see a significant decline of over 12% as a result of the economic transition plan.
The article indicates that the S&P 500 index, which the SPY ETF tracks, could also experience a sharp decline of around 8.67% due to the potential market turmoil.
